---
title: "LMB 2026"
subtitle: "Rosters"
author: "Axel Mora"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default]
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
    logo: lmb_logo.png
    css: styles.css
    footer: "Liga Mexicana de Béisbol | Análisis de Datos"
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    highlight-style: monokai
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(gt)
library(forcats)
library(readr)

rosters_lmb_full <- read_csv("rosters_lmb_full.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
teams_ids <- read_csv("teams_ids.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

rosters_lmb_full <- rosters_lmb_full %>%
  left_join(teams_ids %>% select(Team, logo), by = "Team")

teams <- sort(unique(rosters_lmb_full$Team))
```

## Rosters 2026

`r length(teams)` Equipos.

```{r}
#| output: asis

for (t in teams) {
  
  df <- rosters_lmb_full %>% 
    filter(Team == t)
  n_players <- nrow(df)
  logo_url <- df$logo[1]
  avg_age <- round(mean(df$age, na.rm = TRUE), 1)

  # =========================
  # SLIDE 1 – RESUMEN
  # =========================
  
  cat(paste0(
    "\n\n## <img src='", logo_url, 
    "' height='60' style='vertical-align:middle; margin-right:15px;'> ",
    t, "\n\n",
    "### Resumen General\n\n",
    "- Jugadores: ", nrow(df), "\n",
    "- Edad promedio: ", avg_age, "\n"
  ))
  
  # =========================
  # SLIDE 2.1 – TABLA
  # =========================
  
  cat(paste0(
    "\n\n## <img src='", logo_url, 
    "' height='50' style='vertical-align:middle; margin-right:10px;'> ",
    t, " – Roster\n\n"
  ))
  
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(Position)
    
  print(
    df[1:15,] %>%
      select(Name, Number, Position, age, `Birth Country`, Bats, Throws) %>%
      gt()
  )
  
  # =========================
  # SLIDE 2.2 – TABLA
  # =========================
  
  cat(paste0(
    "\n\n## <img src='", logo_url, 
    "' height='50' style='vertical-align:middle; margin-right:10px;'> ",
    t, " – Roster\n\n"
  ))
  
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(Position)
  
  print(
    df[16:n_players,] %>%
      select(Name, Number, Position, age, `Birth Country`, Bats, Throws) %>%
      gt()
  )
  
  # =========================
  # SLIDE 3 – NACIMIENTO
  # =========================
  
  cat(paste0(
    "\n\n## <img src='", logo_url, 
    "' height='50' style='vertical-align:middle; margin-right:10px;'> ",
    t, " – País de Nacimiento\n\n"
  ))
  
  print(
    df %>%
      count(`Birth Country`) %>%
      mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(`Birth Country`, pct), y = pct)) +
      geom_col() +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      theme_minimal()
  )
  
}

```
